allow: Bash(source .env.local 2>/dev/null; curl -s "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key=$GEMINI_API_KEY" 2>&1 | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.models?.filter\(m=>/veo|video|imagen/i.test\(m.name\)\).forEach\(m=>console.log\(m.name, '-', m.supportedGenerationMethods?.join\(', '\)\)\)" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(source .env.local 2>/dev/null; curl -s "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/veo-3.0-generate-001?key=$GEMINI_API_KEY" | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(source .env.local 2>/dev/null; export GEMINI_API_KEY; sleep 10; curl -s "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/veo-3.0-fast-generate-001/operations/yx5s2qwpyyzv?key=$GEMINI_API_KEY" 2>&1 | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\);const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('done:', j.done\);if\(j.response\) console.log\('response keys:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(j.response\)\)\);if\(j.error\) console.log\('error:', j.error.message\);console.log\(d.slice\(0,500\)\)")

Bash(source .env.local 2>/dev/null; export GEMINI_API_KEY

echo "=== Pattern 1: query param ==="
curl -s "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/veo-3.0-fast-generate-001/operations/yx5s2qwpyyzv?key=$GEMINI_API_KEY" 2>&1 | head -5

echo -e "\\n=== Pattern 2: header auth ==="
curl -s -H "x-goog-api-key: $GEMINI_API_KEY" "https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/veo-3.0-fast-generate-001/operations/yx5s2qwpyyzv" 2>&1 | head -5)
